title: Evercrown
description:
Roadmap

Об игре

Spin the wheel and discover your abilities with every turn.

Re-roll, lock in the best results, and build your perfect turn.

It’s up to you to turn a random draw into a winning strategy.

Use your abilities, bonuses, and passives to defeat your enemies.

Each turn depends on your build and the choices you’ve made before.

The further you progress, the more powerful your options become.After each battle, choose an upgrade from several options.

Add bonuses to your skills, unlock passives, or recruit new heroes.

Every choice directly influences your run.

Create synergies, stack bonuses, and skyrocket your damage.

Go from dealing a few hits to unleashing devastating combos.

The further your build progresses, the more powerful your attacks become.

Choose your upgrades, adapt your build, and push your limits.

Every game is different thanks to the bonuses and possible combinations.

No run ever goes as planned.
description_short: A turn-based tactical roguelike where your heroes’ actions are decided by a slot machine. Spin, lock, and reroll abilities, read enemy intentions, build powerful synergies, and push your run into explosive late-game scaling.
